name: Smart Powerr Corp.
summary: Smart Powerr Corp. (CREG) is a Nevada holding company operating through PRC subsidiaries. It provides waste energy recycling and energy efficiency solutions for energy-intensive industries in China using a Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT) model. Systems capture waste heat, pressure, and flue gas from manufacturing to generate low-cost electricity, reducing customer energy costs by 5–20%. The company is transitioning into an energy storage integrated solution provider targeting PV/wind stations, commercial complexes, and smart energy cities.

products.name: Waste Heat Recovery Power Generation Systems
products.description: Captures waste heat and pressure from flue gas in manufacturing to generate electricity and reduce energy costs by 5-20%.

products.name: Energy Saving Systems and Equipment (BOT)
products.description: Build-Operate-Transfer model for constructing, selling, and leasing energy saving systems to industrial customers in China.

products.name: Financial Leasing of Energy Assets
products.description: Financial leasing, purchase, disposal, and repair of financial leasing assets related to energy saving equipment.

products.name: Energy Storage Integrated Solutions
products.description: Planned expansion into energy storage solutions for industrial complexes, PV/wind stations, remote islands, and smart energy cities.
